---
title: "Writing"
comments: false
description: ""
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

<style>
  .substack-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.75rem;
  }
  .substack-subtitle {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .substack-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    background-color: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    border-radius: 4px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .substack-btn:hover {
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    color: #fff;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .posts-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.25rem;
  }
  .post-card {
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, background-color 0.2s;
    color: inherit;
  }
  .post-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
  }
  .post-thumbnail {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .post-placeholder {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(74,144,164,0.25), rgba(127,176,105,0.15));
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .post-body {
    padding: 1rem;
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.35rem;
  }
  .post-date {
    font-size: 0.73rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .post-title {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .post-excerpt {
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-top: 0.15rem;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  #posts-status {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 1.5rem 0;
  }
</style>

<div class="substack-header">
  <p class="substack-subtitle">Essays and reflections on research, faith, and identity</p>
  <a href="https://follhim.substack.com" target="_blank" class="substack-btn">
    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
      <path d="M22.539 8.242H1.46V5.406h21.08v2.836zM1.46 10.812V24L12 18.11 22.54 24V10.812H1.46zM22.54 0H1.46v2.836h21.08V0z"/>
    </svg>
    View on Substack
  </a>
</div>

<div id="posts-status">Loading posts…</div>
<div id="posts-grid" class="posts-grid"></div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const FEED = 'https://follhim.substack.com/feed';
  const PROXY = 'https://corsproxy.io/?' + encodeURIComponent(FEED);
  const status = document.getElementById('posts-status');
  const grid = document.getElementById('posts-grid');

  const SUBSTACK_ICON = `<svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)">
    <path d="M22.539 8.242H1.46V5.406h21.08v2.836zM1.46 10.812V24L12 18.11 22.54 24V10.812H1.46zM22.54 0H1.46v2.836h21.08V0z"/>
  </svg>`;

  function formatDate(str) {
    if (!str) return '';
    try {
      return new Date(str).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
        year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric'
      });
    } catch(e) { return ''; }
  }

  function getNodeText(item, tag) {
    const el = item.getElementsByTagName(tag)[0];
    if (!el) return '';
    // <link> is a weird element in RSS — its text is a child text node
    return (el.textContent || el.innerText || '').trim();
  }

  function getExcerpt(item) {
    // Try <subtitle> first (Substack sometimes includes this)
    const subtitle = item.getElementsByTagName('subtitle')[0];
    if (subtitle && subtitle.textContent.trim()) return subtitle.textContent.trim();

    // Fall back to stripping HTML from <description>
    const desc = getNodeText(item, 'description');
    if (!desc) return '';
    // Strip HTML tags
    const tmp = document.createElement('div');
    tmp.innerHTML = desc;
    const text = (tmp.textContent || tmp.innerText || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    return text.length > 180 ? text.slice(0, 180).replace(/\s\S*$/, '') + '…' : text;
  }

  function getThumbnail(item) {
    // 1. media:content url attribute
    const media = item.getElementsByTagName('media:content')[0];
    if (media && media.getAttribute('url')) return media.getAttribute('url');

    // 2. enclosure url attribute
    const enc = item.getElementsByTagName('enclosure')[0];
    if (enc && enc.getAttribute('url')) return enc.getAttribute('url');

    // 3. First <img> inside description CDATA
    const desc = getNodeText(item, 'description');
    if (desc) {
      const m = desc.match(/<img[^>]+src=["']([^"']+)["']/i);
      if (m) return m[1];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function renderItems(items) {
    if (!items.length) {
      status.textContent = 'No posts found.';
      return;
    }
    status.style.display = 'none';

    items.forEach(function (item) {
      const title   = getNodeText(item, 'title');
      const link    = getNodeText(item, 'link');
      const date    = getNodeText(item, 'pubDate');
      const thumb   = getThumbnail(item);
      const excerpt = getExcerpt(item);

      const card = document.createElement('a');
      card.className = 'post-card';
      card.href = link || '#';
      card.target = '_blank';
      card.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';

      const imgEl = thumb
        ? `<img class="post-thumbnail" src="${thumb}" alt="" loading="lazy">`
        : `<div class="post-placeholder">${SUBSTACK_ICON}</div>`;

      card.innerHTML = imgEl + `
        <div class="post-body">
          <div class="post-date">${formatDate(date)}</div>
          <div class="post-title">${title}</div>
          ${excerpt ? `<div class="post-excerpt">${excerpt}</div>` : ''}
        </div>`;

      grid.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  function parseAndRender(xmlText) {
    const parser = new DOMParser();
    const doc = parser.parseFromString(xmlText, 'application/xml');
    const parseError = doc.querySelector('parsererror');
    if (parseError) throw new Error('XML parse error');
    const items = Array.from(doc.getElementsByTagName('item'));
    renderItems(items);
  }

  // Try direct fetch first; fall back to CORS proxy
  fetch(FEED)
    .then(function (r) {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Direct blocked');
      return r.text();
    })
    .then(parseAndRender)
    .catch(function () {
      return fetch(PROXY)
        .then(function (r) { return r.text(); })
        .then(parseAndRender);
    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      status.innerHTML = 'Could not load posts. <a href="https://follhim.substack.com" target="_blank" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)">Visit Substack →</a>';
      console.error('Substack feed error:', err);
    });
});
</script>
